place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa with Mountain Backdrop, Lamai
blurb: A calm three-bedroom pool villa in a gated Lamai estate, set against a green mountain backdrop with a private pool framed by natural stone and timber. Single-storey living, three en-suite bedrooms, an open marble kitchen and a covered dining sala. ฿10,900,000.
detail:
Tucked into a gated residential estate in the Lamai hills, this single-storey villa balances clean white architecture with warm natural materials — timber columns, natural-stone garden walls and a private pool that catches the mountain view. It sits on 534 m² of land with 320 m² of built space, a short drive from Lamai's beach and town.

The open-plan living level runs from a marble-topped kitchen with a central island through bright living and dining areas that open to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom, several looking straight out to the water, with air-conditioning throughout and the villa delivered fully furnished.

Outside, the pool is wrapped by a sun terrace, lawn and mature frangipani, with a covered sala for long lunches. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 26 years and 2 months remaining, running to September 2052. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
